description: I’ve been using it for about 4 years now and it has worked great. The platform is reliable, and support is fast to respond and helpful when questions come up.
author: Adam K.
pros: Easy to use and flexible platform with strong third-party integrations. It makes creating forms, collecting data, and automating processes much faster and more efficient.
cons: Form formatting relies heavily on CSS instead of a visual editor, which can make customization more difficult for users who are not comfortable with coding.

review_title: Great Customisation and Outstanding Customer Service
description: Formaloo has been a great addition to our toolkit. It offers a wide range of customization options for building forms, and the overall experience has been excellent. We’re very happy with the platform and, especially, the outstanding technical support.
author: Ernst V.
pros: Ease of Use: Formaloo is very intuitive and easy to navigate. Even users who are not particularly tech‑savvy can build and manage forms without difficulty. Customization: There are many ways to customize forms to suit specific business requirements, which gives a lot of flexibility. Customer Support: The support team is truly impeccable. They are responsive, knowledgeable, and always willing to go the extra mile - even when it comes to finding unique or custom solutions to specific problems.
cons: Dashboard Performance: The dashboards for form responses can occasionally lag when loading. Drag‑and‑Drop Functionality: Updating form statuses using drag‑and‑drop can be a bit glitchy at times - occasionally not moving immediately or taking a moment to respond. Email Notifications: Form completion notifications and completed PDFs sent via email can sometimes get lost and require manual downloading. This may partly be due to our own email security settings, but it has happened on occasion.

description: It takes lots of communication with the Formaloo team to fix bugs and/or correct your forms, dashboards, etc. I think Formaloo has a lot of potential! You will have to be very patient as a Formaloo user, though.
author: Sheila D.
pros: -Formaloo dashboards so that external "users" can see their data. This is very difficult to set up correctly though. -You can submit an idea/feature to Formaloo team and they might implement it.
cons: -Formaloo has a lot of bugs in their system. If you report the issues they will usually fix them, eventually. Their system/code isn't the best. You will have to do a lot of troubleshooting. -Formaloo doesn't have every capability that I had hoped for, including "features" that they told us were capabilities, that really aren't. -Formaloo will also make updates without telling you, so you may have to change the way you have your stuff setup.

description: When I started with Formaloo, I was moving from a competitor and in doing the forms on a new system was a bit of a new experience. I didn't understand everything about how to use their interface. I tend not to just create simple forms, but forms that require calculations and cross-referencing and different things like that. I always try to challenge what a system can do. However, the support team there has been incredible. They've had a fair number of chat requests from me-"Hey, how do I do this?" "Hey, how do I do that?"-and they're always so helpful, understanding, and quick to reply all the time. Overall, the experience has been extremely positive.
author: Paul B.
pros: Formaloo has been absolutely amazing at being able to create forms easily and quickly. And not just simple forms, but even those involving calculations or drop-downs and radio buttons, whatever.
cons: What do I like least about Formaloo is probably that I can't say something has to have two decimal places. While you can restrict something to being two decimal places, you can't say if it's 0, 0 that it has to be 2.00. It'll just show up as 2. That's a pretty minor issue, but you wanted something here.

description: Formaloo is my favorite Software. They are the kind of software company you hope for: committed to its product, improving it continuously, and backing it with fantastic, responsive support—and yes, they promptly reply to support questions. Oh, by the way. When we started, it was version 2, they are now on 5.0 They consistently work to improve and add value.
author: Tony C.
pros: Ease of use and the invaluable information you get from it. At DiscoverTitusville.com, we’ve been using Formaloo for several years. It’s essential for gathering information about local businesses and identifying those interested in our services. We have a business owner survey, which goes out once a week as part of your newsletter campaign. Local businesses are asked to fill it out so we can learn more about their business. In the survey, after they have a chance to share information about their products and services we directly ask them if they are interested to a business listing. We also ask them if they are open to other marketing solutions. Based on their responses, we route them into the appropriate follow-up sequences. Formaloo has also been instrumental in collecting valuable feedback on our newsletter, helping us keep subscribers active and engaged. We know Formaloo can do even more, and we’ll continue expanding our use over time. For now, it’s been a game changer for discovering new businesses.
cons: There is so much it can do, it's sometimes hard to break away from playing with the possibilities or adding to what is already working well.

description: Simple and easy to use form platform that really exceeded expectations and helped address an issue promptly
author: Andrew M.
pros: We had a client that needed a simple way to circulate their code of conduct to vendors, workforce and reenactors. Formaloo enable us to get the information out there, and have users sign that they understood.
cons: There were not really any other than getting the form header image just right sook some time, but other than that there are no real cons

review_title: It can replace an entire suite of Softwares like Forms, Quiz builder, CRM, LMS, Survey software etc.
description: Overall Formaloo is a High Value for Money as compared to any of its alternative. You can actually replace quite a few different softwares like for Forms, CRM, Quiz builder, LMS, Survey software, etc. - for just this 1 software. Plus UI/UX is good & can be easily used by Non-Techincal, No-Code. Low-Code users as well.
author: Kapil -.
pros: Initially I got interested in Formaloo because I thought it is a Great alternative for TypeForm & Google Forms but later on I realized that it is like entire Business Operating System
cons: Although it is a Great alternative for TypeForm for doing Surveys, etc. but I noticed that I was not able to find a lot of beautiful & aesthetically designed Survey Templates like in TypeForm.

description: In general I would recommend and have recommended Formaloo to my peers who do the same type of work I do and who would be able to use it in the same way.
author: Becky H.
pros: Customer service is always prompt and extremely helpful, even doing calls or videos with you to assist in getting the end result you need.
cons: Some aspects are not intuitive and take a little learning or playing with before you get the hang of them.

review_title: Formaloo: Powerful, Versatile, and Getting Better All the Time
description: I've used Formaloo for several years after acquiring it through an AppSumo lifetime deal, and the recent updates have made it genuinely impressive. The AI form builder alone is worth it. What used to take hours now takes minutes. If you need a flexible, powerful form and data collection tool that grows with you, Formaloo delivers.
author: Sandee R.
pros: I've used Formaloo for a number of years now and it just keeps getting better. Here are some things I appreciate about it: • AI-powered form building — give it a detailed prompt with your questions and get a nearly-complete form in minutes, saving hours of manual formatting • Versatile use cases — works for private community applications, surveys, email marketing, intake forms, and more • WordPress integration — embeds smoothly into WordPress websites • Easy result retrieval — form results are simple to access and act on • Intuitive interface — easy enough to use without needing to contact support
cons: Like any robust tool, there's a learning curve when exploring the more advanced features, but it's worth the effort.

description: I use Formaloo for complex forms with reliable delivery and linking to Google Sheets. It's easy to use, and their customer support is perfect, helping me with building complex forms for clients.
author: David L.
pros: Using a cloud-based website building software, building forms and embedding on client websites has been great. Fantastic options with easily viewable results for myself and my clients.
cons: Nothing, everything works like a charm. I am only writing this much to hit the 100 word min. But there really isn't anything bad.

review_title: Great platform and easy to use
description: Pleasurable. I was able to start setting up a quiz in no time and the free plan gives access to all the features I need. That was a plus for me.
author: Chev C.
pros: I love how easy the platform has been to use. It makes setting up forms so simple and easy! I wanted to create a quiz and found Formaloo and in minutes I had my quiz completed
cons: No cons presently. I think Formaloo is doing a great job. The only thing I’d say is to maybe adjust billing structure and give the option to do quarterly billing if possible.

review_title: A great way to create complex forms
description: Overall quite positive, we’ve used it a lot with our clients who have been satisfied at the level of polish and security too.
author: Glen M.
pros: The platform has all the features that a lot of others lack, including html email support for auto responders and complex logic that is easy to implement.
cons: The rendering can sometimes be a little buggy. This means that the form will sometimes not be completely accessible.

description: Excellent. Highly recommend. User interface and final outcome, both are a breeze to use once setup is done.
author: Aman G.
pros: I was looking for the simplest way do a really complicated survey and formaloo came to rescue. Gone are the days when you need complicated softwares to do complex personality quizzes.
cons: Learning curve was a bit off in the beginning but as I kept going, I understood the design intention.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Best design options, easy, simpler and functional. All and all a much better alternative to the mainstream form that we are all used to. Also the low to no code options is a plus
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Love the whole folder structure and how easy it is to simply put a form together and then categorize several different ones in a go
cons: I would say the dashboard doesnt quite seem accurate, still had to use an external solution for that

description: Formaloo is a unique form builder that has many applications for all sorts of projects that can be easily implemented on any website. The dashboard and builder is easy to use. Overall great tool and usability compared to other form builders.
author: Taylor C.
pros: Easy to create projects and build all type of forms. There are so many features that can apply to any project. Support is great and willing to help if you have trouble. Great value for the software. Reporting and tracking is accurate and analyzing results is clear to understand. Have not experienced many bugs or security issues.
cons: Setting up notification emails can be confusing. In viewing responses, wish the user didn't have to side scroll and you can see all columns with a full screen monitor or make the bottom side scroll visible to able to drag across with mouse.

review_title: Formaloo is a must look-at for your forms & quick client-portals
description: I love the ease of use and the ability to emded a form on an external site, or even as a widget. It simplifies an entire aspect of capturing all kinds of information. Have not hit any major issues or bugs with it so far and have been using it for over a year, which says a lot in itself.
author: Erle P.
pros: Formaloo is easy to get started with. Makes it simple to create a form, that suits what you need, while being easy to use for the end user. The captured data is easy to access and can be exported /connected to google sheets without too much of an effort.
cons: As the usage increases, like a complex set of forms that need to interact, it can get harder to navigate and envision how it works. For example when creating a client portal, and customised can be a bit challenging unless you have a clear set of documentation around it (especially for teams, when someone else has a update it)

review_title: Formaloo is a stable, well supported platform!
description: My experience has been positive, and I am impressed with both the options offered, and I feel that the company has my back.
author: Fara S.
pros: The platform is intuitive and the options are impressive. Customer support is amazing. It is a friendly platform and an excellent choice for both beginners, and those with more advanced skills.The learning curve is kind. Great platform!
cons: I honestly can’t think of anything about formalLoo that I dislike. I’m sorry but I can’t. It’s awesome! Ty
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My Favorite in Building Customized Surveys
description: Great experience so far. Formaloo helped me a lot to create advanced surveys suitable for different applications.
author: Patrick M.
pros: Formaloo is a great form-building platform that I used to build my surveys. There are so many features that will allow you to build any type of form you need and the platform is easy to use. My favorite feature is the logic/smart flow that moves you to the appropriate question based on the selected answer.
cons: There are too many features in Formaloo that will require some time and practice to get used to and master the platform.

review_title: A Flexible and Powerful Tool for Building Forms and Apps
description: Overall, Formaloo has been a very positive experience. It’s a versatile tool that bridges the gap between form-building and lightweight app creation. Once you get familiar with the platform, it can save a lot of time and bring structure to projects that might otherwise feel scattered.
author: Thomas C.
pros: I really liked how intuitive and flexible Formaloo is. The builder makes it easy to set up forms without coding and the wide range of templates helps jumpstart projects quickly. It’s great for collecting and organizing data in a structured way. I also appreciated how collaborative it felt—being able to share and work with team members in real-time is a huge plus.
cons: While it’s powerful, the learning curve can feel steep at times when diving into more advanced features.

description: Overall Experience was good and the creation of forms was easy and you also store that data in database and also getting insights ans analysis of the form data
author: Kalpit G.
pros: The thing I like most about Formaloo is that it provides me with database as well as form builder to make advanced forms and we also get insights on form usage.
cons: The thing I don't like about Formaloo is that it the UI is not very clean and feels clustered also it gets slow when dealing with large datasets so we have to do optimization.

review_title: Excellent tool for registration and other data collection
description: My team and I are happy using the tool. The interface is intuitive, data collection and scoring are easy, though form loading can be slow, and quick access to frequent actions would improve usability.
author: Suhas M.
pros: Collecting registration data, running course quizzes, and computing scores is super easy. Formaloo supports both objective scoring and manual updates for subjective answers. The interface is intuitive and makes it easy to learn and use the tool in a self-serve way, though it could be a bit lighter on server resources to feel faster.
cons: Form loading is a bit slow, and quick access to frequent actions like Edit Form or View Responses would improve usability.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Frank O.
pros: I love the variety of features for the price. From a simple form to math calculations. Each version improves and provides more tools to create forms that collect the data we need, without much effort.
cons: I would like to have more control over the design of tables and pages. I would like to create a client portal with better design options.

description: Free version is great for taking surveys, i am not sure about the advantages of paid version yet as I haven't used it.
author: Iman G.
pros: You can create good-looking forms with ease, with multiple templates available. You can easily collect payment through the form itself. Also the UI is very friendly.
cons: For now, i don't see any cons yet, will test more and do another review.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Formaloo must be on your to-do!
description: Great app to create templates for building apps. The overall features are great if you don't want to be stuck making new codes.
author: Gargi K.
pros: Among other things, the customer support was amazing! The user friendly interface makes is super easy to use and the free version is a cherry on top!
cons: Changing a form from one layout to another can be a little challenging at times, but every software has a learning curve so wouldn't really complain.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I loved it, i had never seen a website like this one. Keep up the good work its amazing. Thank you formaloo
author: Melissa L.
pros: You can build your own personalized quizzes and make your own surveys. It can be whatever you need it to be
cons: Wish there was more options for design options and such. I like to make my things flashy and colorful
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
